notes.heading: Game Port now controls launch
notes.body: The setup Game Port is now passed to Dragonwilds as the documented -port value, so changing it actually changes the port used when the server starts.

notes.heading: Secondary Port is clearer
notes.body: The app now derives and shows the Secondary Port as Game Port + 1, making it easier to know which two UDP ports need forwarding.

notes.heading: Safer custom launch args
notes.body: Any stale custom -port value is replaced with the saved Game Port, while other launch flags like -log and -NewConsole are preserved.
